547 ANTBTC_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD ANTBTC_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication): Antibiotic (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking medication from the antibiotic class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
548 ANTBTC_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD ANTBTC_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication): Antibiotic (Dsch) CHAR
